queries.predicted_sql: SELECT a."Name", a."Gender" FROM (SELECT b."Author_ID", COUNT(b."Book_ID") AS book_count FROM "book" b GROUP BY b."Author_ID") AS ab JOIN "author" a ON ab."Author_ID" = a."Author_ID" ORDER BY ab."book_count" DESC LIMIT 1

queries.question: Find the names of the authors who did not have any book with the "Accor" press.
queries.gold_sql: SELECT name FROM author EXCEPT SELECT t1.name FROM author AS t1 JOIN book AS t2 ON t1.author_id  =  t2.author_id JOIN press AS t3 ON t2.press_id  =  t3.press_id WHERE t3.name  =  'Accor'
queries.predicted_sql: SELECT a."Name" FROM "author" a LEFT JOIN "book" b ON a."Author_ID" = b.Author_ID AND b.Press_ID = (SELECT Press_ID FROM "press" WHERE "Name" ILIKE '%Accor%') WHERE b.Author_ID IS NULL

queries.question: Which authors have never published under the "Accor" press? Give me their names.
queries.gold_sql: SELECT name FROM author EXCEPT SELECT t1.name FROM author AS t1 JOIN book AS t2 ON t1.author_id  =  t2.author_id JOIN press AS t3 ON t2.press_id  =  t3.press_id WHERE t3.name  =  'Accor'
queries.predicted_sql: SELECT a."Name" FROM "author" a LEFT JOIN "book" b ON a."Author_ID" = b."Author_ID" AND b."Press_ID" = (SELECT "Press_ID" FROM "press" WHERE "Name" ILIKE '%Accor%') WHERE b."Author_ID" IS NULL ORDER BY a."Name" NULLS LAST

queries.question: Find the name and the yearly profit in billion for press that published more than two books.
queries.gold_sql: SELECT t2.name ,  t2.Year_Profits_billion FROM book AS t1 JOIN press AS t2 ON t1.press_id  =  t2.press_id GROUP BY t2.press_id HAVING count(*)  >  2
queries.predicted_sql: SELECT p.name, to_char(to_date(b.sale_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY') AS sale_year, SUM(p.month_profits_billion) AS total_profits_billion FROM book b JOIN press p ON b.press_id = p.press_id GROUP BY p.name, sale_year HAVING COUNT(b.book_id) > 2

queries.question: Find the press that published more than two books, and return its name and yearly profit in billion.
queries.gold_sql: SELECT t2.name ,  t2.Year_Profits_billion FROM book AS t1 JOIN press AS t2 ON t1.press_id  =  t2.press_id GROUP BY t2.press_id HAVING count(*)  >  2
queries.predicted_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(p.year_profits_billion) AS total_year_profits FROM press p JOIN book b ON p.press_id = b.press_id GROUP BY p.name HAVING COUNT(b.book_id) > 2
